global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with engaging text and icons promoting a game.
global.main_message: Unlock rare gear with free rewards for new players.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: GlitchWave BONUS
elements.description: Bold, yellow text with a slight shadow effect, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Game gear icons
elements.description: Four circular icons arranged in a grid, each with a dark circle in the center, representing game gear.

elements.label: Unlock rare gear
elements.description: Large, white text that reads 'Unlock rare gear', prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Free rewards for new players
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline, providing additional information about the rewards.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A simple white arrow icon pointing to the right, indicating action or progression.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom with rounded corners, featuring the text 'Book now' in bold white.

elements.label: Top decorative line
elements.description: A thin decorative line above the headline, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Left decorative line
elements.description: A small vertical line on the left side of the ad, enhancing the layout.

elements.label: Bottom decorative line
elements.description: A small vertical line on the right side of the ad, balancing the design.

elements.label: Main call to action
elements.description: The prominent 'Unlock rare gear Free rewards for new players' text, encouraging user engagement.
elements.text_content: Unlock rare gear Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Secondary headline
elements.description: A smaller text that reinforces the main message, positioned at the top.

elements.label: Final call to action
elements.description: A small button at the bottom with the text 'Book now', inviting immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, playful and colorful, engaging text and icons.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Unlock rare gear, Free rewards for new players, GlitchWave BONUS, Book now
